query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "ideas have genomes: benchmarking scientific lineage reasoning and line" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly measures the mechanism of "scientific lineage reasoning" and "lineage" (via citation evolution graphs and DAGs) to generate research ideas, which is the core subject of the user's question regarding the "Ideas Have Genomes" benchmark.
